parents.subject: LU-8257 utils: fix mtab symlink logic

commit.subject: LU-8401 lnet: remove dependency on OFED headers from lnet
commit.message:
LU-8401 lnet: remove dependency on OFED headers from lnet

The LNet layer shouldn't refer to anything in the RDMA world directly.
All OFED dependent code should be localized into o2iblnd.
So, remove dependency on OFED headers from all code except o2iblnd.
